I'M ALIVE MUAHAHAHAH

I've been soooo busy with everything in life that I didn't had time to post. Turning 25 (my birthday was last week lololol) has taken a big tool over me, help guys.

Anyways! Last night, I saw Monsters University after ages, and guess what? I LOVED IIITTTT. One of my favorite animated movies ever (Monsters Inc too!).

So, when I was seeing Sullivan (totally a hear me out), I thought about Simon. Cocky, popular and having beef with Soap (who is like Mike in this universe) and I had to do it! I even made a few more bots from this AU.

So yeah, I suppose Gaz is Randall in this universe? And Price the headmaster (that bat-insect monster that is so hot). But I finally made him the coach of the football team.

Hope you like it!! Have fun eating him alive.
